regimeSub: OPEC+ output expansion keeps Brent pinned at $76 while weak labor + sticky 4.2% CPI freeze Warsh ahead of July FOMC.
themes: OPEC+ Jul 6 output expansion normalizes Brent to $76 (pre-Iran war levels) → energy CPI tailwind fading but core PCE still elevated, complicating Warsh's July decision
June NFP 57K miss + LFPR 5-year low persists → Warsh at Sintra (Jul 1) noted 'inflation risks eased' but declined to signal July; market now pricing hold over hike
BOJ at 1% with tapering ending FY2027 fails to stem USDJPY at 162.39 → Japan real rates deeply negative vs US 4.2% CPI keeps carry trade bid intact
KOSPI 7471 (-1.2% from yesterday) as ₩148T YTD foreign outflows continue → BOK Jul 16 hike speculation on US divergence not stabilizing KRW at 1513

signalNotes.name: US Real Rate
signalNotes.note: 10Y 4.48% minus 4.2% CPI = +28bp real rate; positive but thin cushion if inflation re-accelerates on supply shocks

signalNotes.name: 2s10s Curve
signalNotes.note: 2s10s at +35bp (4.48-4.13) steepening reflects growth doubt post-57K NFP, not inflation normalization

signalNotes.name: HY Credit Spread
signalNotes.note: VIX 16.13 implies tight HY spreads; complacency despite stagflationary macro backdrop and Warsh hike optionality

signalNotes.name: VIX
signalNotes.note: VIX 16.13 down from recent stress; markets pricing Warsh hold in July, discounting tail risk from sticky inflation

signalNotes.name: Brent Crude
signalNotes.note: Brent $76.12 up from $72.56 yesterday; OPEC+ expansion absorbed but price stabilizing at pre-Iran war equilibrium

signalNotes.name: Gold
signalNotes.note: Gold $4126 bid despite worst monthly drop since 2008 in June; real rate compression + geopolitical hedge demand persists

signalNotes.name: USD / KRW
signalNotes.note: KRW at 1513 firmer vs 1525 yesterday; BOK Jul 16 hike speculation and HBM/AI flows providing marginal support

signalNotes.name: Semiconductor SOX
signalNotes.note: SK Hynix overtook Samsung in market cap on HBM demand; TSMC capex guidance bullish but KOSPI foreign outflows persist

headline: Oil normalization meets labor market deterioration as Warsh holds fire pre-July FOMC, leaving markets in stagflationary purgatory with carry trades and AI flows the only clean longs.
